name: Entenmann's Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Spray an 8-1/2" Pyrex loaf dish with Pam.
3. Cream butter with powdered sugar on high speed of mixer for 5 minutes.
4. Add 1 egg and then a little flour, beating for 2 minutes.
5. Add 2nd egg and half of remaining flour, beating for 2 more minutes.
6. Add 3rd egg, rest of flour, and extract, beating for 2 more minutes.
7. Spread thick and creamy batter evenly in prepared loaf dish.
8. Bake for 65 minutes or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in baking dish on wire rack for 30 minutes.
10. Remove from dish and slice 1/2" thick.
11. If freezing, be sure to slice before freezing the loaf. Thaw to use within 6 months.
